# Her Handshake — AI Playbook for Small Business

> Practical AI tools and prompts for non-technical small business owners and solopreneurs.

## About

Her Handshake is an AI education brand that helps small business owners use AI to save time, automate repetitive tasks, and grow revenue — without needing a technical background.

The flagship product is the **AI Playbook for Small Business** ($49.99, one-time purchase, instant PDF download).

## Product: AI Playbook for Small Business

- **Price:** $49.99 one-time (no subscription)
- **Format:** Instant PDF download, lifetime access
- **Guarantee:** 30-day money-back guarantee
- **Buy:** https://buy.stripe.com/fZu14gf7Tf9XeQ0cP15J601
- **Site:** https://ai-playbook-sales.vercel.app

### What's included:
- 7 chapters covering every core area of a small business
- 15 copy-paste AI prompt templates (works with ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini)
- 3 real small business case studies
- 4 worksheets to build your own AI workflow
- 30-day implementation roadmap

### Who it's for:
Non-technical solopreneurs and small business owners who want to use AI to save 10+ hours per month on email, content creation, customer service, social media, and admin tasks.
